business.name: Communal Market
business.description: Communal Market is a neighbourhood cafe and bakery in Caulfield, Melbourne. Perfect 5-star Google rating. Specialty coffee, cinnamon scrolls, pastries, and light food made fresh daily.

hero.headline: Communal Market
hero.descriptor: Your neighbourhood spot for specialty coffee, freshly baked pastries, and light food — made with care, served with warmth.
hero.image_alt: Communal Market storefront on Glen Huntly Road, Caulfield

about.headline: About Communal Market
about.content: A neighbourhood cafe and bakery in the heart of Caulfield, serving specialty coffee, freshly baked pastries, and light food made with care.

services.headline: What We Serve
services.subheadline: From the first coffee of the morning to a late lunch — everything is made fresh daily.

contact.headline: Find Us
contact.subheadline: We're on Glen Huntly Road in Caulfield — a short walk from Caulfield station.
